Name: Irish Espresso Martini
Description: A classic Espresso Martini with a modern, Irish twist.

Name: Plum Reckoning
Description: A rich and complex rum cocktail with notes of plum and spice.

Name: Nutty Highland Sour
Description: A silky blend of honeyed Drambuie and toasted hazelnut.

Name: Coconut Margarita
Description: A vibrant pink margarita with a festive coconut-flake rim.

Name: Snowman Hot Chocolate
Description: A winter warmer blending hot cocoa with creamy liqueur and a marshmallow snowman.

Description: A vibrant seasonal twist on the classic Paloma, balancing bright citrus agave with a festive cranberry syrup.

Name: Raspberry Lemon Drop Martini
Description: A vibrant, sweet-tart classic featuring premium vodka, fresh lemon, and a burst of ripe raspberry.

Name: Santa Clause Margarita
Description: A festive seasonal twist on the classic margarita, offering a warm and cheerful holiday spirit in every sip.
